summary: The SwingRatings algorithm indicates that WY is currently testing its Daily 200MA support zone near $24.23. Based on historical price action, bounces from this level have yielded a win rate of 9.1%. The asset has recently tested this support 2 time(s), which may have partially consumed buy-side liquidity. In the event of a successful bounce, traders should monitor overhead supply, particularly a primary horizontal resistance at $24.54. This setup presents a structured risk-reward profile for swing positioning.
